---
title: "Sophia Petrovna Swetchine"
---

## Sophia Petrovna Swetchine

**Dates:** (1782-1857)

**Maiden name:** (Soymanof)

### Description

Russian mystic

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by CMY in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from March 18th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
